feedback_files.tests/test_repair_feedback.py:
import gzip

from transport.encoder import encode_body


def test_standard_gzip_client_can_decode_the_emitted_body():
    body = b"report payload for a standards-compatible client"
    message = encode_body(body)
    assert message["content_encoding"] == "gzip"
    assert gzip.decompress(message["body"]) == body
